(@P0 nvarchar(4000),@P1 decimal(38,0),@P2 decimal(38,0))SELECT TOP 10  TRIGGER_NAME, TRIGGER_GROUP, NEXT_FIRE_TIME, PRIORITY FROM QRTZ_TRIGGERS WHERE SCHED_NAME = 'Common_Scheduler' AND TRIGGER_STATE =  @P0 AND NEXT_FIRE_TIME <=  @P1 AND (MISFIRE_INSTR = -1 OR (MISFIRE_INSTR <> -1 AND NEXT_FIRE_TIME >=  @P2 )) ORDER BY NEXT_FIRE_TIME ASC, PRIORITY DESC
